items.name: Blade Whetstone
items.description: Sharpens your weapon. +3 attack damage this run.

items.name: Iron Tonic
items.description: Restores 30 maximum health for this run.

items.name: Scavenger Kit
items.description: Gain +10 loot from every encounter this run.

items.name: Ancestral Shard
items.description: Permanently increases banked XP gain by 10%.

items.name: Warden Map
items.description: Reveals Warden phase HP thresholds during the boss fight.

items.name: Heavy Rations
items.description: Start each run with 20 extra maximum stamina.

items.name: Master the Polearm
items.description: Unlocks the iron polearm. High damage, high stamina cost, good poise damage.

items.name: Master the Bow
items.description: Unlocks the short bow. Rapid attacks, ranged advantage, low poise damage.

items.name: Veteran Spirit
items.description: Start each run with more stamina.

items.name: Warden Insight
items.description: See the Warden's damage per phase.
